languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, я предлагаю вам осмотреть череп лично и попробовать задать ему любые интересующие вопросы. Это будет наиболее наглядно". {n}Ферренц учтиво подносит череп к коммандному трону.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, я предлагаю вам осмотреть череп лично и попробовать задать ему любые интересующие вопросы. Это будет наиболее наглядно". {n}Ферренц учтиво подносит череп к коммандному трону.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, propongo que examine el cráneo personalmente y le pregunte cualquier duda que tenga. Le resultará muy educativo». {n}Ferrenz lleva cortésmente el cráneo al trono de mando.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, propongo que examine el cráneo personalmente y le pregunte cualquier duda que tenga. Le resultará muy educativo». {n}Ferrenz lleva cortésmente el cráneo al trono de mando.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人，我建议您亲自对这颗头骨进行检测，并询问任何您想知道的问题。其反馈结果将极具启发性。”{n}费伦茨礼貌地将头骨带到指挥王座前。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我建议您亲自对这颗头骨进行检测，并询问任何您想知道的问题。其反馈结果将极具启发性。”{n}费伦茨礼貌地将头骨带到指挥王座前。{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je vous propose d'examiner le crâne vous-même et d'essayer de lui poser des questions. Cette démarche se révélera très instructive, » {n}déclare Ferrenz en apportant poliment le crâne au trône de commandement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je vous propose d'examiner le crâne vous-même et d'essayer de lui poser des questions. Cette démarche se révélera très instructive, » {n}déclare Ferrenz en apportant poliment le crâne au trône de commandement.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, kafatasını bizzat incelemenizi ve aklınızdaki soruları sormanızı öneririm. Bu, fazlasıyla aydınlatıcı olacaktır." {n}Ferrenz, kafatasını kibarca komuta tahtına taşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, kafatasını bizzat incelemenizi ve aklınızdaki soruları sormanızı öneririm. Bu, fazlasıyla aydınlatıcı olacaktır." {n}Ferrenz, kafatasını kibarca komuta tahtına taşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain, ich schlage vor, Ihr untersucht den Schädel persönlich und stellt ihm mögliche Fragen, die Ihr habt. Das wird gewiss ausgesprochen lehrreich sein." {n}Ferrenz trägt den Schädel höfflich zum Kommandothron.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I propose that you examine the skull personally and try to ask him any questions you may have. It will prove most instructive." {n}Ferrenz politely carries the skull up to the command throne.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, ich schlage vor, Ihr untersucht den Schädel persönlich und stellt ihm mögliche Fragen, die Ihr habt. Das wird gewiss ausgesprochen lehrreich sein." {n}Ferrenz trägt den Schädel höfflich zum Kommandothron.{/n}

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、この頭骨を直接調べて、何でも質問してみてはいかがでしょうか。とても勉強になりますよ」{n}フェレンツ、丁重に頭蓋骨を指揮台まで運ぶ。{/n}
